##LOCALITY=Saima alkaline complex, Liaoning Province, China
##OWNER=Geological Museum of China
##SOURCE=Bin Wu
##DESCRIPTION=Individual prismatic, columnar and platy translucent to transparent, colourless crystals associated with microcline, nepheline, aegirine, natrolite, eudialyte, fluorapatite, stronadelphite and calcite. Type sample described in Wu et al (2022)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250047
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Sr_2.82_Ca_1.79_Na_0.16_La_0.15_Ce_0.09_Pr_0.01_Nd_0.01_Gd_0.01_)P_2.97_O_12_[F_0.66_(OH)_0.34_] ; Calculated on the basis of 13 total anions per formula unit and F+(OH) = 1
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, profile is calculated
